---
title: "The Rt. Rev. William Walsham How"
---

## The Rt. Rev. William Walsham How

**Dates:** (13 Dec 1823- 10 Aug 1897)

### Description

Bishop of Bedford

### Biography

He married (6 Nov 1849) Frances Ann Douglas (d. 1887).  He was  Bishop of Bedford, suffragan for East London, later Bishop of Wakefield. [How, <i>William Walsham How</i>; ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 2d [1900]
- Letter from June 22d [1888]
- Letter from St. Michael [29 September 1887]
- Letter from 1887
- Letter from St Stephen\'s day [26 December] 1884

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
